r.t: select NM1 , NVL(case when NM1 = NM2 then NM3 else NM2 end,NM4) as NM2 , case when NM1 = NM2 then '' else NM3 end as NM3 , NM4 , MENU_ACT_ID, case when ROLE_7 = '' then '

') as ROLE_12 from ( select NM1, NM2, NM3, NM4, MENU_ACT_ID ,CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_7,1,1),'Y','C'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_7,2,1),'Y','R'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_7,3,1),'Y','U'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_7,4,1),'Y','D'),'N','')) as ROLE_7 ,CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_4,1,1),'Y','C'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_4,2,1),'Y','R'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_4,3,1),'Y','U'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_4,4,1),'Y','D'),'N','')) as ROLE_4 ,CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_5,1,1),'Y','C'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_5,2,1),'Y','R'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_5,3,1),'Y','U'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_5,4,1),'Y','D'),'N','')) as ROLE_5 ,CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_12,1,1),'Y','C'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_12,2,1),'Y','R'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_12,3,1),'Y','U'),'N',''),REPLACE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(ROLE_12,4,1),'Y','D'),'N','')) as ROLE_12 from ( select (select DISPLAY_NM from C_MENU_DISPLAY X where X.lang_cd = 'ko-KR' and X.MENU_ACT_ID = SUBSTR(A.MENU_ACT_ID,1,6) ) as NM1 , (select DISPLAY_NM from C_MENU_DISPLAY X where X.lang_cd = 'ko-KR' and X.MENU_ACT_ID = PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ) as NM2 , (select DISPLAY_NM from C_MENU_DISPLAY X where X.lang_cd = 'ko-KR' and X.MENU_ACT_ID = SUBSTR(A.MENU_ACT_ID,1,12) ) as NM3 , MENU_NM as NM4 , MENU_ACT_ID , max(case when ROLE_ID = 7 then CONCAT(C,R,U,D) else '' end) as ROLE_7 , max(case when ROLE_ID = 4 then CONCAT(C,R,U,D) else '' end) as ROLE_4 , max(case when ROLE_ID = 5 then CONCAT(C,R,U,D) else '' end) as ROLE_5 , max(case when ROLE_ID = 12 then CONCAT(C,R,U,D) else '' end) as ROLE_12 from ( select a.* , D.DISPLAY_NM , b.WINDOW_ACT_ID , c.GROUP_ID, c.ROLE_ID, c.USE_YN, c.C, c.R, c.U, c.D , ROW_NUMBER() over ( partition by A.MENU_ACT_ID, C.ROLE_ID order by b.WINDOW_ACT_ID) as RNO from ( SELECT B.PKG_ID,B.PKG_NAME, CASE WHEN A.MENU_ACT_ID= B.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID THEN '0' ELSE B.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID END AS PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, CASE WHEN A.MENU_ACT_ID= B.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID THEN '' ELSE B.PAR_MENU_DISPLAY_NM END PAR_MENU_DISPLAY_NM,B.DISPLAY_ORDER, A.DISPLAY_NM AS MENU_NM ,A.MENU_ACT_ID FROM ( SELECT B.DISPLAY_NM, A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.MENU_ACTION_YN, A.BIZ_AUTH_YN, A.SCREEN_TYPE_CD,A.SCREEN_ID,A.MENU_FORM_URL, A.MENU_LOCATION_CD,A.MENU_ITEM_YN,A.POPUP_YN FROM C_MENU_ACT A, C_MENU_DISPLAY B WHERE A.MENU_ACT_ID= B.MENU_ACT_ID AND B.LANG_CD ='ko-KR' ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT C.PKG_ID,D.PKG_NAME,C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, E.DISPLAY_NM AS PAR_MENU_DISPLAY_NM,C.MENU_ACT_ID,C.DISPLAY_ORDER FROM C_PKG_MENU_MAP C, C_PKG D, C_MENU_DISPLAY E WHERE C.PKG_ID = D.PKG_ID AND C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = E.MENU_ACT_ID AND E.LANG_CD ='ko-KR' ) B ON(A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND B.PKG_ID = 6 and A.MENU_ACT_ID like 'AML%' ) a, C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP b, C_AUTH_WINDOW_MAP c, C_WINDOW_DISPLAY D where a.MENU_ACT_ID = b.MENU_ACT_ID and b.WINDOW_ACT_ID = c.WINDOW_ACT_ID and c.WINDOW_ACT_ID = D.WINDOW_ACT_ID and D.lang_cd = 'ko-KR' and c.USE_YN = 'Y' and C.ROLE_ID in ( select ROLE_ID from c_role) and WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN = 'Y' ) A where RNO = 1 group by MENU_ACT_ID ) A ) A order by MENU_ACT_ID
